penalties.plainLanguage: Higher pay for ordinary hours worked on a Sunday — 200% of the base rate.

penalties.title: Sunday
penalties.plainLanguage: Higher pay for ordinary hours worked on a Sunday — 225% of the base rate.

penalties.title: Public holiday
penalties.plainLanguage: Higher pay for ordinary hours worked on a public holiday — 250% of the base rate.

penalties.title: Public holiday
penalties.plainLanguage: Higher pay for ordinary hours worked on a public holiday — 275% of the base rate.

penalties.title: Overtime — first 3 hours
penalties.plainLanguage: Overtime is paid at 150% of the base rate (Overtime — first 3 hours).

penalties.title: Overtime — after 3 hours
penalties.plainLanguage: Overtime is paid at 200% of the base rate (Overtime — after 3 hours).

penalties.title: Overtime — Sunday
penalties.plainLanguage: Overtime is paid at 200% of the base rate (Overtime — Sunday).

penalties.title: Overtime — public holiday
penalties.plainLanguage: Overtime is paid at 250% of the base rate (Overtime — public holiday).
